mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_alert_workflow ( fingerprint, workflow_status, workflow_note, silenced_until, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{fingerprint}, #{workflowStatus}, #{workflowNote}, #{silencedUntil}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) ) ON CONFLICT (fingerprint) DO UPDATE SET workflow_status = EXCLUDED.workflow_status, workflow_note = EXCLUDED.workflow_note, silenced_until = EXCLUDED.silenced_until, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
